title: ITALY enforcement action against Federazione Nazionale Ordini Professioni Infermieristiche (FNOPI) (2,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on the Federazione Nazionale Ordini Professioni Infermieristiche (FNOPI). The controller published the personal data of a data subject in relation to a 'public competition for exams to fill one full-time, permanent position in category C'. The con...
